geocode.source: Bronx: Lurting Avenue - Morris Park to Rhinelander Ave.

text:
Lurting Ave., north from and including Morris Park Ave. to Rhinelander Ave. W.P.A. workmen are paving the street south of Morris Park Ave.

December 14, 1936.

Works Progress Administration.
Federal Art Project photo.
title: Bronx: Lurting Avenue - North - Morris Park to Rhinelander Ave.
